title: lotononis lupinifolia var. intermedia
intro: Lotononis lupinifolia var. intermedia, also known as the 'Bleeding Heart Tree' or 'Lotus Tree', is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lotononis lupinifolia var. intermedia include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
